{{Quote|I wish my master had not suffered because of me.|[[Juhani]] to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] on almost killing Quatra|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
'''Quatra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. She took [[Juhani]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and trained her at the [[Jedi Enclave]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

==Biography==
Juhani, a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]], had much trouble controlling her emotions and finding peace within herself. Master Quatra devised an unorthodox plan to test her Padawan's spirit. During a [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber training]] duel, Juhani failed her master's test. She lashed out in anger during their training session and struck Quatra down. Though Quatra only received minor wounds, she feigned [[Death/Legends|death]] in order to test Juhani even more. Filled with fear and guilt at the 'death' of her master by her own hands, Juhani fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and fled the Enclave, intent on never returning.<ref name="KotOR game" />

Juhani was later found by a redeemed [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], meditating in an [[Ancient Grove|ancient grove]] near the old [[Rakatan ruins (Dantooine)|Rakatan ruins]]. After a brief [[Duel in the Ancient Grove|duel]], Revan proved to be the stronger of the two and was able to convince Juhani to forsake the dark side. Juhani returned to the Enclave seeking forgiveness from the [[Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council]]. The Council was exceedingly grateful to see Juhani come back to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and praised Revan for his assistance. They also informed Juhani that Master Quatra was not dead after all, but had only been injured in their duel, and that the duel itself was Quatra's last trial for her Padawan.<ref name="KotOR game" />
